judgment.summary: ServiceNow is a rapidly growing, highly profitable software company with strong cash flow and a reasonable forward valuation, despite a high trailing P/E.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter EPS was in line with estimates; next earnings date is 2026-07-22.
positives: Forward P/E 19.78x and PEG ratio 1.00x suggest reasonable valuation relative to future growth.
Revenue growth of 22.1% YoY indicates strong top-line expansion.
Operating margin of 13.3% and Profit margin of 12.6% demonstrate healthy profitability.
Free cash flow of $5.11B TTM is substantial and supports operations.
Consensus is strong buy with a high mean analyst target of $142.77.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 59.18x is very high, indicating significant market expectations.
Earnings growth of 2.3% YoY is lagging revenue growth.
Current ratio of 0.84 and Quick ratio of 0.69 suggest potential short-term liquidity concerns.
Debt/Equity ratio of 20.73% is high, though offset by strong cash and FCF.

news.paragraph: The provided headline about a parody political party in India is unrelated to ServiceNow (NOW) and its business operations. Therefore, it offers no relevant context for an options trader considering contracts on this ticker. Traders should focus on company-specific news and upcoming events.

headlines.title: A parody ‘cockroach’ party in India becomes major outlet for youth anger and protest
